title: Messaging Gateway
summary: The messaging gateway connects Hermes to 20+ platforms (Telegram, Discord, Slack, WhatsApp, Signal, SMS, Email, Matrix, etc.) through a single background process that handles sessions, security, cron jobs, and voice delivery.

env_vars.name: GATEWAY_ALLOW_ALL_USERS
env_vars.purpose: Allow all users on all platforms (not recommended)

cli_commands.purpose: Interactive setup for all messaging platforms

config_keys.description: Tool activity display: off, new, all, verbose
How to handle messages while agent is busy: interrupt, queue, steer
Background process notification level: all, result, error, off
Isolate session history per user in shared channels

slash_commands.purpose: Set this chat as the home channel
Run prompt in a separate background session

code_examples.caption: Install as systemd user service (Linux)
code_examples.code:
hermes gateway install
hermes gateway start
journalctl --user -u hermes-gateway -f

gotchas: Gateway denies ALL users by default without allowlist or DM pairing
DM pairing codes expire after 1 hour and are rate-limited
Multiple installations on same machine each get their own systemd service name
PATH changes after launchd install: run `hermes gateway install` again to capture new PATH
/background sessions are isolated — they don't know about current chat context
full_text:
# Messaging Gateway

Chat with Hermes from Telegram, Discord, Slack, WhatsApp, Signal, SMS, Email, Home Assistant, Mattermost, Matrix, DingTalk, Feishu/Lark, WeCom, Weixin, BlueBubbles (iMessage), QQ, Yuanbao, Microsoft Teams, LINE, or your browser.

## Platform Comparison

| Platform | Voice | Images | Files | Threads | Reactions | Typing | Streaming |
|----------|:-----:|:------:|:-----:|:-------:|:---------:|:------:|:---------:|
| Telegram | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | — | ✅ | ✅ |
| Discord | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ |
| Slack | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ |
| WhatsApp | — | ✅ | ✅ | — | — | ✅ | ✅ |
| Signal | — | ✅ | ✅ | — | — | ✅ | ✅ |
| SMS | — | — | — | — | — | — | — |
| Email | — | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | — | — | — |
| Matrix | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ |
| Mattermost | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | — | ✅ | ✅ |
| Home Assistant | — | — | — | — | — | — | — |

## Quick Setup

```bash
hermes gateway setup        # Interactive setup for all messaging platforms
hermes gateway              # Run in foreground
hermes gateway install      # Install as user service (Linux)
sudo hermes gateway install --system   # Boot-time system service (Linux)
hermes gateway start/stop/status
```

## Chat Commands (Inside Messaging)

| Command | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| `/new` or `/reset` | Start fresh conversation |
| `/model [provider:model]` | Show or change model |
| `/personality [name]` | Set personality |
| `/retry` | Retry last message |
| `/undo` | Remove last exchange |
| `/status` | Show session info |
| `/whoami` | Show slash command access (admin/user/unrestricted) |
| `/stop` | Stop running agent |
| `/approve` | Approve pending dangerous command |
| `/deny` | Reject pending dangerous command |
| `/sethome` | Set this chat as home channel |
| `/compress` | Manually compress conversation context |
| `/voice [on|off|tts|join|leave|status]` | Control voice replies |
| `/rollback [number]` | List or restore filesystem checkpoints |
| `/background <prompt>` | Run prompt in separate background session |
| `/reload-mcp` | Reload MCP servers from config |
| `/update` | Update Hermes Agent |
| `/help` | Show available commands |

## Session Management

Sessions persist until reset. Reset policies:
- **Daily** (4:00 AM default) or **Idle** (1440 min default) or both

```json
// ~/.hermes/gateway.json
{
  "reset_by_platform": {
    "telegram": { "mode": "idle", "idle_minutes": 240 }
  }
}
```

## Security

By default, the gateway denies all users not in an allowlist or paired via DM.

```bash
TELEGRAM_ALLOWED_USERS=123456789
DISCORD_ALLOWED_USERS=123456789012345678
GATEWAY_ALLOWED_USERS=123456789,987654321  # Cross-platform
GATEWAY_ALLOW_ALL_USERS=true               # NOT recommended
```

### DM Pairing (Alternative to Allowlists)

Unknown users receive a one-time pairing code:
```bash
hermes pairing approve telegram XKGH5N7P
hermes pairing list
hermes pairing revoke telegram 123456789
```
Codes expire after 1 hour.

### Slash Command Access Control

Split users into admins (full slash commands) and regular users (explicit list only). Platform-specific via `allow_admin_from` and `user_allowed_commands`. `/help` and `/whoami` always allowed.

## Interrupting the Agent

Send any message while agent is working to interrupt:
- In-progress terminal commands killed (SIGTERM → SIGKILL after 1s)
- Tool calls cancelled (only currently executing one runs)
- Multiple messages combined into one prompt
- `/stop` — interrupt without queuing follow-up

## Busy-Input Modes

```yaml
display:
  busy_input_mode: steer   # interrupt (default) | queue | steer
  busy_ack_enabled: true
```

## Background Sessions

```
/background Check all servers and report any down
```

Each `/background` spawns a separate agent with isolated session. Result delivered to same chat when done.

## Service Management (Linux systemd)

```bash
hermes gateway install
journalctl --user -u hermes-gateway -f
sudo loginctl enable-linger $USER
```

## Service Management (macOS launchd)

```bash
hermes gateway install
tail -f ~/.hermes/logs/gateway.log
```
